title: Zip Zoom Zing
poem_text:
Zip zip, wheels go spin,
Zoom zoom, wind rush in.
Clink clank, bells go ring,
Ding dong, hear them sing.
Vroom vroom, engine loud,
Beep beep, through the crowd.
Honk honk, geese fly high,
Whoosh whoosh, cloud in sky.
Tick tick, clock says slow,
Shhh... now where did all the noise go?
cover_context: A bright, swirling night sky filled with glowing wheels, bells, and birds, all fading into soft stars as a child snuggles under a blanket.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, xylophone and soft claps, 110 BPM, bouncy and playful, fun energy that channels into rhythm, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
